Hero.headline: Loyalty that lives on your customers' phones
Hero.sub: Fan Kit brings your loyalty program straight to your customers' phones with Apple Wallet & Google Wallet. No apps to download, no paper cards to lose. Just scan, save, and go.
Hero.cta: Be the first to know when we launch

Features.title: Everything you need to keep customers coming back

noApp.title: Scan & Go
noApp.description: Customers scan a QR code and they're in. No app downloads, no sign-up forms — onboarding takes seconds.

engagement.title: Digital cards, zero waste
engagement.description: Your loyalty cards live right on your customers' phones. No paper punch cards that end up in the trash.

location.title: Show up on their lock screen
location.description: When a customer is near your business, their pass pops up automatically. A friendly reminder you're right around the corner.

realtime.title: SMS campaigns & offers
realtime.description: Send coupons, promotions, and personalized offers straight to your customers via SMS. Direct, simple, effective.

step1.title: Design your card
step1.description: Create a loyalty card with your brand, colors, and rewards — it takes just a few minutes.

step2.title: Share a QR code
step2.description: Customers scan it and save your card to their wallet. One tap, done.

step3.title: Engage & reward
step3.description: Track visits, send offers via SMS, and keep your customers coming back.

WaitlistCTA.headline: Ready to modernize your loyalty program?
WaitlistCTA.sub: Sign up for early access and be among the first to get started with Fan Kit.
